journal.digestGeneratesOnSunday: Your weekly digest will generate on Sunday based on this week's dreams.
journal.digestLogMore: Log at least one dream this week to get your digest.
journal.digestStale: New dreams logged since this digest
journal.digestPremiumLock: Unlock your weekly AI dream digest with Premium.
journal.quickEntrySubtext: Dreams fade fast — capture yours now
journal.emptySubtext: Tap the + button to log your first dream
journal.deleteDreamMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"?

calendar.addDreamSub: Log a dream for this night
calendar.iForgotSub: Mark this night — helps track recall rate
calendar.forgottenNight: You marked this night as forgotten

insights.title: Insights
insights.logMoreForTrends: Log a few more to see trends
insights.patternsWillAppear: Patterns will appear as you log more dreams
insights.lockSubtext: See your dream patterns, emotion trends, recurring symbols, and recall rate with Premium.
insights.logFirstDream: Log your first dream to start seeing patterns

settings.title: Settings
settings.morningReminderSub: Get reminded to log your dreams
settings.wbtbAlarmSub: Wake Back to Bed technique alarm
settings.notificationsDisabledMessage: Enable notifications in your device Settings to use reminders.
settings.notificationsDisabledWbtb: Enable notifications in your device Settings to use the WBTB alarm.
settings.resetDataMessage: This will delete all dreams, settings, and progress. This cannot be undone.
settings.noDreamsMessage: There are no dreams to export.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Something went wrong while exporting your dreams. Please try again.
settings.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
settings.howOftenRemind: How often should we remind you?

dreamDetail.limitReachedMessage: You've used all 10 interpretations for today. Come back tomorrow!
dreamDetail.reinterpretMessage: This will replace the current interpretation and use one of your {{period}} interpretations.
dreamDetail.deleteTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this dream?
dreamDetail.noConnectionMessage: Please check your internet connection and try again.
dreamDetail.interpretFailedMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
dreamDetail.rateLimitedMessage: You've made too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
dreamDetail.dailyLimitReached: Daily limit reached — come back tomorrow
dreamDetail.disclaimer: For entertainment and self-reflection only. Not professional psychological advice.

newDream.title: New Dream
newDream.contentPlaceholder: Describe your dream in as much detail as you can remember...
newDream.gibberishWarning: Please describe your dream using real words

paywall.genericHeading: How does your free trial work?
paywall.timelineTodayDesc: Unlock everything — unlimited interpretations, patterns, lucid dreaming tools & more.
paywall.timelineDay5Desc: We'll remind you before your trial ends.
paywall.timelineDay7Desc: Subscription begins — cancel anytime in a few taps.

dreamDictionary.title: Dream Dictionary
dreamDictionary.lockSubtext: Unlock the full dream symbol reference with Premium — 80+ symbols, offline, no ads.

emotionTags.title: Emotion Tags
emotionTags.description: Choose which emotions appear on the dream entry form. You can enable or disable tags — at least 2 must remain active.
emotionTags.minimumTagsMessage: You need at least 2 emotion tags enabled.

welcome.privacyLine2: Your dreams stay on your device.

painPoint.stat: People who journal their dreams recall 3x more within two weeks.

features.heading: Here's what Lucid can do for you
features.aiInterpretationDesc: Understand what your dreams mean with personalized AI analysis
features.patternDetectionDesc: Discover recurring symbols, emotions, and themes across your dreams
features.lucidToolsDesc: Reality checks, WBTB timers, and techniques to dream consciously
features.calendarDesc: See your complete dream history at a glance, color-coded by mood

notifications.title: Never lose a dream again
notifications.body1: Journaling within 5 minutes of waking triples dream recall.
notifications.body2: We'll send a gentle morning reminder to help you capture your dreams before they fade.

nameInput.heading: What should we call you?
nameInput.subtext: We'll use this to personalize your experience.
nameInput.privacy: Your name stays on this device

quizFrequency.heading: How often do you remember your dreams?
quizFrequency.everyMorningSub: I usually wake up with a dream fresh in my mind
quizFrequency.fewTimesWeekSub: Some mornings I remember, some I don't
quizFrequency.rarelySub: I almost never remember what I dreamed

quizDetail.heading: When you remember a dream, how detailed is it?
quizDetail.vagueSub: More of a mood than a memory
quizDetail.partialSub: I remember a rough sequence of events
quizDetail.fullSub: I could describe them in detail

quizGoals.heading: What interests you most?
quizGoals.meaningsSub: Decode the symbols and messages in your dreams
quizGoals.lucidSub: Learn to become aware and take control inside your dreams
quizGoals.patternsSub: See recurring themes, emotions, and symbols over time
quizGoals.journalingSub: A private space to record my dreams before they fade

quizJournalExp.heading: Have you kept a dream journal before?
quizJournalExp.triedSub: Started once or twice but fell off
quizJournalExp.appSub: I've tried a different dream journal app
quizJournalExp.activeSub: I currently log my dreams regularly

quizRecurring.heading: Do you experience recurring dreams or nightmares?
quizRecurring.recurringSub: The same dream keeps coming back
quizRecurring.nightmaresSub: I have disturbing dreams that wake me up
quizRecurring.neitherSub: My dreams are mostly unique each time

firstDream.heading: Let's try it right now.
firstDream.subtext: What did you dream about last night?
firstDream.placeholder: I was in a house I didn't recognize, but it felt familiar. There was water rising slowly from the floor...
firstDream.privacy: Your dreams are private and never leave your device

interpretation.label: Your dream interpretation
interpretation.premiumUpsell: Your first interpretation is free. Unlock unlimited interpretations with Premium.

aiConsent.title: AI Dream Interpretation
aiConsent.body: To interpret your dream, Lucid sends your dream text, emotion tags, and themes to Anthropic (Claude), a third-party AI service. Your dream data is processed to generate your interpretation but is not permanently stored. By continuing, you consent to this data being sent.
